responses.text: The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated the frequency of people feeling lonely in Japan.
The epidemic has slowed down, but it has already caused an impact on the mental health of the whole population.
The isolation is unbearable for some people, leading to thoughts of suicide.
The number of suicides under the age of 20 was 659, an increase of 10.0% year-on-year, the highest since 2000.
Prime Minister of Japan Yoshihide Suga decided to introduce the post of Minister to combat loneliness and isolation.
The spread of the COVID-19 epidemic is a main factor affecting the increase in the number of suicides.
The number of suicides in Japan fell by 14% during the first wave of the pandemic in February-June 2020
A total of 2,087 people have died from coronavirus in Japan since the start of the year
Especially housewives are affected by the pandemic
Suicide rates have risen sharply in Japan in 2020.

Islamic, Arab and other countries have united to confront the deal of the century, act on international resolutions and the Arab Peace Initiative to form an independent Palestinian state centered on East Jerusalem on the 1967 borders.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas announced that the Palestinians would no longer abide by their agreements with Israel and Washington.
Abbas reiterated his support for efforts to form unity in Palestinian positions and to confront plots that seek to deprive the Palestinian people of their legitimate rights.
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on April 26 that Israel would exercise sovereignty over Jewish settlements in the Jordan Valley and West Bank in the coming months.
The peace agreement is the result of lengthy negotiations between the United States, Israel and the United Arab Emirates.

The Foreign Ministry of the Palestinian Authority also condemned the aggressive attack by the Zionist army on the leaders of the Islamic Jihad in Damascus and Gaza and called on the international community and the United Nations to act to stop the crimes of the regime.
Donald Trump offered to help Israel and the Palestinians in achieving peace
The Palestinian Authority cannot respond to the COVID-19 epidemic as an independent, sovereign state
Palestinian leader Mahmoud Abbas agreed to a direct dialogue with Israel.
Israel, the UAE and Bahrain signed an agreement on the full normalization of relations

Some clinics around the world say the number of cosmetic surgeries has increased during the coronavirus era.

The incident is being resolved through judicial procedures.

NASA is developing a rocket to take people to Mars and is experimenting with producing oxygen on the planet.

The amount of compensation for each case that has been settled will be in the millions to thousands of dollars.

The painting “Portrait of a woman ” by Gustav Klimt is worth 60 million euros.
Make-up artist Andrea Reed turns her lips into fascinating works of art.
In 1997, the police speculated that the prisoner had removed the frame from the roof of the gallery and hung the work, but the search was fruitless for many years.

Italian prosecutor Ornella Chicca said the actual painting was verified as authentic, but it remains unclear whether the painting was later smuggled back into the wall mezzanine or was hidden there from the beginning, pending further examination and clarification.
Former managers of the famous American actor Johnny Depp sued him.
Gardeners found the painting embedded in one of the garden walls while cleaning the gallery's garden ivy.

In the Italian city of Piacenza, a gardener peeled ivy off the wall in the Ricci Oddi gallery and accidentally found a painting by Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a Woman ” stolen 22 years ago from the same gallery.

235 illegal migrants in 17 boats attempting to cross the English Channel from northern France were intercepted by British Coast Guard and Border Guard officers on Thursday.
The English Channel is known for strong winds, high currents and heavy sea traffic, but many people are still smuggled from northern France to the United Kingdom.
The migrants were identified in a small inflatable boat about 1.5 kilometers off the coast of the city of Calais and rescued by border guards
Increased patrolling of beaches by French police and increased intelligence exchange between French and French law enforcement and security agencies had reduced the number of stowaways.

A court in Ontario, Canada, ruled that Iran's actions were deliberate "terrorism" based on written evidence provided by the family.
Iran does not recognize the decisions of the Canadian court in the case of the downed Ukrainian plane
The Canadian Court does not have the jurisdiction to investigate the Ukrainian plane crash or possible failure in an incident that occurred outside the territory and jurisdiction of Canada.
Iranian authorities admitted that the Ukrainian plane was mistakenly shot down by an anti-aircraft missile system of air defense
Iran is prepared to pay compensation to the families of the victims of Ukraine International Airlines Flight PS752, which was shot down near Tehran in January.
All 176 people on board the plane were killed, including 11 Ukrainians, citizens of Iran, Canada, Sweden, Afghanistan, Germany, and the United Kingdom.

The international community has condemned Japan's decision to restart commercial whaling
The International Whaling Commission (IWC) has banned commercial whaling since 1986.
Japan is resuming commercial whaling for the first time in 37 years.
The whales that are hunted end up on the table.
Last year, Japanese whale-hunting vessels caught at least 333 minke whales, or small fin whales, for what they described as "scientific research".
Japan has decided to withdraw from the International Whaling Commission (IWC).

The fully superconducting tokamak nuclear fusion experimental device (EAST) of the Hefei Institute of Materials of the Chinese Academy of Sciences has successfully achieved repeatable 120 million degrees centigrade and 101 seconds of plasma operation.
Nuclear fusion can generate large amounts of energy with a small amount of clean fuel.
Nuclear fusion provides clean, reliable and carbon-free energy
